asset_name: Card Hand Conversion Set — twelve conversion and utility cards
shared_properties: Each card uses a consistent fantasy frame, title zone, cost orb, and central icon silhouette.
Element and utility cards must remain legible in a five-card hand without zooming.
The sheet supports both mouse selection and number-key quick use mappings.
differences: This file covers in-battle hand cards and quick-read card faces.
The post-battle reward selection panel remains in a later UI task.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Moodboard for combining magical ornamentation with clean high-contrast card readability.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player_silhouette
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette board for sizing the hand fan so cards do not cover the student sprite.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_2/ui_card_hand_conversion_set.png during DuelLoading and cache the atlas under ui_card_hand_conversion_set.
runtime_notes: Frame order is water, fire, thunder, ice, inversion, amplify, split, time_warp, dark_absorb, perfect_reflect, light_refract, poison_inject.
Card face art is static while cost pips and level text can be overlaid through runtime text or icon sprites.
Fan five active cards across the lower band and keep each card root on integer positions to avoid shimmer during hover lift.

context.usage: Card faces shown in the bottom hand, reward previews, and deck inspection popups during battle.

layout_notes: Card frame leaves a 28px title band, a 24px cost orb, and a large icon field for elemental readability.
Five-card hand fits inside x=250..1670 with 24px overlap on idle fan layout.
Frame ornament intensity increases on higher-cost utility cards but the silhouette remains consistent.

shape.silhouette: Portrait fantasy cards with arched gold frames, top title band, side cost orb, and center spell icon.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 1080x520px with twelve 180x260 card frames and no padding.
All twelve named card types are distinguishable by icon silhouette and accent color in a compressed hand layout.
Cost orb and title band remain readable while cards overlap by 24px in the default fan arrangement.
No card art extends outside the documented frame bounds or clips when lifted on hover.
